scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @lumex/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @lumex/analytics-core && npm run build --workspace @lumex/lumex-source && npm run build --workspace @lumex/api && npm run build --workspace @lumex/web && npm run build --workspace @lumex/jobs
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @lumex/shared-types && npm run typecheck --workspace @lumex/analytics-core && npm run typecheck --workspace @lumex/lumex-source && npm run typecheck --workspace @lumex/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @lumex/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @lumex/jobs
